citation.title: Citation
citation.text: Yang, Zheng. 2026. Dialects Atlas. Retrieved from https://dialects.yzup.top
citation.note: If you use data from this website in academic papers, research reports, or other publications, please cite it according to the format above.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection and Use
dataCollection.intro: Dialects Atlas (dialects.yzup.top) is committed to protecting user privacy. We solemnly promise:
dataCollection.minimal: Minimal Data Collection: This website only collects necessary technical information (such as access logs, browser type) to maintain normal website operation and improve user experience.
dataCollection.noPersonal: No Personal Identification Information: We do not actively collect personally identifiable information (such as name, phone number, birthday, etc.).
dataCollection.security: Data Security: All collected data is protected using industry-standard security measures to prevent unauthorized access, disclosure, modification, or destruction.

cookies.title: Use of Cookies
cookies.intro: This website may use Cookies and similar technologies to:
cookies.analytics: Analyze website traffic and user behavior patterns to improve service quality
cookies.note: You can manage or disable Cookies through browser settings, but this may affect the normal use of some website functions.

commitment.title: Data Protection Commitment
commitment.noSell: ✓ Not to sell or rent user data to any third party
commitment.noLeak: ✓ Not to disclose personal privacy information, unless required by law or with explicit user consent
commitment.review: ✓ Regular security review to ensure data protection mechanisms remain effective
commitment.transparent: ✓ Transparent communication: users will be promptly notified of any significant changes to the privacy policy

rights.title: User Rights
rights.know: Know what data we have collected about you
rights.correct: Request correction or deletion of inaccurate data
rights.optOut: Opt out of certain data collection activities

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.intro: If you have any questions or comments about this privacy policy, please contact us:

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: The dialect data provided on this website is for academic research and cultural exchange purposes only. While we strive for accuracy and completeness of data, we do not guarantee absolute accuracy. Users are responsible for any consequences arising from the use of data from this website.
